data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations that the requirement for 'Code/alias instead of name' has been satisfied. While the linked use case describes the need for anonymity in bookings, there is no direct evidence that this functionality has been implemented or validated in the current saga run. The prior step evidence does not address the specific requirement of using a code instead of a real name, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of a code/alias instead of a real name in the booking process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the use of code/alias instead of name.
